# @nimiq-faucet/sdk

Framework-agnostic client for the Nimiq Simple Faucet. Works in browsers and Node 18+.

```ts
import { FaucetClient } from '@nimiq-faucet/sdk';

const client = new FaucetClient({ url: 'https://faucet.example.com' });
const { id, txId } = await client.claim(address, { hostContext: { uid: hashedUid } });
await client.waitForConfirmation(id);
```

Server-to-server with HMAC:
```ts
const client = new FaucetClient({ url, apiKey, hmacSecret });
await client.claim(address, { hostContext: { uid, signature } });
```

API: `claim`, `status`, `waitForConfirmation`, `config`, `subscribe`. All request shapes match `/v1/*` on the server; fetch `${url}/openapi.json` for the source of truth.
